hero.label: // AUTOMATION ENGINEER
hero.title: I build flows that think
hero.subtitle: Automation engineer & vibe coder
hero.description: Smart automations that connect systems, process data and work while you sleep. Specialized in AI integrations, e-commerce and CRM.

bio: I'm an automation engineer based in Braga, Portugal. I specialize in connecting tools that weren't designed to talk to each other — CRMs, e-commerce platforms, AI APIs, ERPs — and making them work as a single coherent system.

My stack is centered around n8n and less.tech for orchestration, with OpenAI and Claude models wired in wherever intelligence adds real value. On the business side I work mostly with HubSpot, Shopify, and Moloni — the tools that run real operations.
When I'm not building automations, I'm usually exploring what the latest models can actually do in production — not benchmarks, real workflows.

philosophy.title: Automate the boring
philosophy.body: If a human is doing it more than twice, a machine should be doing it. I look for repetitive friction and wire it away.

philosophy.title: AI as leverage
philosophy.body: Language models aren't magic — they're powerful tools that slot into real workflows. I build the pipes that make them useful.

philosophy.title: Ship, then refine
philosophy.body: A working automation beats a perfect spec every time. I ship fast, observe, and iterate based on real data.

philosophy.title: Systems thinking
philosophy.body: Every integration affects something downstream. I design flows that are observable, debuggable, and resilient to change.

projects.title: Multi-Tool AI Agent (SUPER AI)
projects.description: Conversational agent powered by Claude Opus 4.6 with Gmail and Microsoft SQL Server exposed as tools, plus persistent memory. Lets non-technical operators query the operational database and send emails in natural language.

projects.title: SQL Agent with Memory
projects.description: LLM agent with conversational memory connected directly to a SQL database. Generates queries, executes them, and explains results — built as a foundation for natural-language data exploration.

projects.title: ERP AI Chatbot for Odoo
projects.description: Natural-language interface to the Odoo sales module. Users ask about sales data and the agent translates intent into ERP queries, returning structured answers.

projects.title: Chat with PostgreSQL Database
projects.description: AI-powered Q&A layer over a Postgres database. Schema-aware prompting lets non-technical users get answers without writing SQL.

projects.title: AI Data Analysis & Reporting
projects.description: Pulls data from MySQL and Google Sheets, runs AI-driven analysis and visualization, generates a PDF report, and emails it out. End-to-end self-service analytics for ops.

projects.title: Document Generation Agent (Create CPO)
projects.description: Form input triggers a LangChain LLM chain that generates a structured Customer Purchase Order document, exports it to xlsx, and delivers it via email. Strict schema, low temperature — deterministic output.

projects.title: HubSpot AI Enrichment Loop
projects.description: Polls HubSpot every 5 minutes for new Contacts and Companies, sends them to Claude for enrichment (firmographics, role inference, missing fields), and writes structured data back via REST API. Strict JSON schema — no manual review.

projects.title: AI-Powered Lead Pipeline
projects.description: Form submission → GPT-5.1 generates a personalized intro from a Google Docs template → lead is upserted into HubSpot with AI context attached as a Note → Gmail follow-up fires. Second GPT pass scores the lead before the CRM write.

projects.title: Leads Analyst — Form to CRM
projects.description: Captures inbound leads via form, enriches with AI research, runs a scoring model against ICP criteria, ranks the lead, and routes to HubSpot with full context. Cuts the manual qualification step out of the funnel.

projects.title: Outbound Prospection Agent
projects.description: Lightweight outbound engine: form input triggers AI-driven prospect research, generates a personalized cold email, and logs the contact to Sheets. Designed to be fast and disposable per campaign.

projects.title: Competitor Analysis & Scoring
projects.description: Automated competitor intelligence: scrapes target sites, runs AI-driven analysis across product, pricing, and positioning axes, then assigns a composite score. Outputs structured comparison data to Sheets.

projects.title: Asana → HubSpot Sync
projects.description: Bi-directional sync between Asana project tracking and HubSpot deals. Pulls portfolio items, extracts shipment data from task comments, and updates deal properties — keeping sales and ops aligned.

projects.title: Notion Meetings → HubSpot
projects.description: Pulls AI-generated meeting notes, summaries, and transcripts from Notion, parses the block structure, and creates structured Engagement Notes on the matched HubSpot contact. Marks each meeting synced to prevent duplicates.

projects.title: Calendar + Notion → HubSpot Meetings
projects.description: Cross-references Google Calendar events with Notion meeting pages and creates HubSpot Meeting engagements with combined context. Skips events where no HubSpot contact match exists.

projects.title: HubSpot Stripe Link Sender
projects.description: Generates Stripe payment links and emails them directly to HubSpot contacts. Streamlines the close-to-collect step for sales without manual link generation.

projects.title: Supplier Invoice Ingestion
projects.description: Parses PDFs from multiple suppliers with different layouts and number formats (European comma decimals, layout drift) into structured line-item data pushed to Google Sheets. Per-supplier parsers built from real production edge cases.

projects.title: Scheduled PDF Invoice Scanner
projects.description: Watches a Google Drive folder on a schedule, extracts structured data from new invoice PDFs, and appends to Sheets — turning a manual filing process into a hands-off pipeline.

projects.title: DHL Transport Invoice Importer
projects.description: Batch-imports DHL transport invoice CSVs, normalizes shipment records, and consolidates them into a single operational sheet for finance reconciliation.

projects.title: Moloni Invoice Automation Suite
projects.description: A family of workflows on top of the Moloni billing API: send invoices to clients and sample shops, generate credit notes, and orchestrate the full invoicing lifecycle with PDF generation and email delivery.

projects.title: Brand Order Scrapers (Stussy, Supreme)
projects.description: Web scrapers that pull live order and product data from brand portals (Stussy, Supreme) into structured Sheets. Each scraper handles its own auth flow and pagination logic.

projects.title: Assembly Order Management System
projects.description: Multi-workflow system that ingests orders from the Rovo Assembly API, syncs detailed order data, generates outbound communications, and pushes status updates to HubSpot deals. Handles pagination, retries, and deduplication.

projects.title: Shopify → HubSpot Order Sync
projects.description: Real-time synchronization between Shopify orders and HubSpot contacts. Creates and updates CRM records on every purchase, with lifecycle stage management and custom property mapping.

projects.title: ShippyPro Integration
projects.description: Integrates ShippyPro shipping data into the operational stack — pulling tracking information and delivery status into the central order workflow.

projects.title: Stripe Payment Sync
projects.description: Pulls Stripe transaction data into operational sheets for reconciliation. Maps payments to internal records and surfaces discrepancies.

projects.title: Stock Request Form
projects.description: Internal request flow with unique request IDs and anti-duplicate submission logic. Form submission creates a Notion record and fires Gmail notifications — replacing an informal back-and-forth process.

projects.title: Rovo Quality Control Form
projects.description: Multi-step QC inspection form with 20+ conditional fields, branching logic per inspection type, and structured data capture to Sheets. Used daily by quality controllers on the production floor.

projects.title: Client Onboarding Scheduler
projects.description: Form-driven onboarding flow that orchestrates Google Calendar invites across multiple stakeholders, handling 30+ scheduling steps with branching logic per onboarding type.

projects.title: Collection Request Webhook API
projects.description: Webhook-based GET/POST API for collection requests, with Notion as the data backend. Lets external systems create and retrieve collection records programmatically.

projects.title: Transport Booking System
projects.description: Multi-channel transport booking: Typeform and custom form ingestion, Notion as data store, automated Gmail notifications to logistics partners. Extracts booking details from Notion into Sheets for batch operations.

projects.title: PHC Client Creation
projects.description: Form-driven flow that creates new finance clients in the PHC ERP via direct SQL operations, with email confirmation and validation guardrails.

projects.title: IT Platform User Provisioning
projects.description: Centralizes user provisioning data across internal platforms into Sheets, giving IT a single view of access state for audits and offboarding.

projects.title: Supplier Email Automation
projects.description: 180-node orchestration handling supplier communication across 12+ vendors: scheduled emails, document attachments from Drive, dataTable lookups, conditional routing per supplier. The backbone of supplier ops.

projects.title: Transaction Email Engine
projects.description: 110-node workflow generating transactional emails directly from a SQL Server database, with templated HTML, conditional content blocks, and Asana ticket creation on failures.

projects.title: HubSpot ↔ Sheets Sync
projects.description: Pull Companies and Deals from HubSpot into Sheets on a schedule, with date-windowed sync logic. Powers operational dashboards and offline analysis.

projects.title: HubSpot Pipeline Days Counter
projects.description: Reads pipeline stage data from SQL, calculates time-in-stage metrics, and writes the results back to dataTable. Surfaces deals stuck in the funnel.

projects.title: Notion Transport Bookings Extractor
projects.description: Extracts transport booking data from Notion databases, normalizes the records, and pushes them into Sheets for downstream operational use.

projects.title: Security Checker (Links & Files)
projects.description: Automated link and file safety checker for incoming content. Scans URLs and attachments, flags suspicious items, and surfaces risk for review.

projects.title: People Count Tracker
projects.description: Pulls people-counting data from SQL and feeds it into operational sheets for footfall analytics.

projects.title: n8n Workflows Backup
projects.description: Self-hosted infrastructure hardening: scheduled backup of all n8n workflows to Google Drive. Versioned, automated, recoverable.

projects.title: n8n Error Notifications
projects.description: Centralized error notification system across all production workflows. Failures surface immediately via Gmail with full context for debugging.

contact.heading: Let's connect
contact.subtext: Available for freelance projects and collaboration. Reach out through any of these channels.
